servinfo.title: Rear Side-Impact Sensor Inspection (8 or 9-Channel Air Bag System)

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Rear Side-Impact Sensor Removal and Installation (8 or 9-Channel Air Bag System)

servinfo.ptxt: Check rear side-impact sensor and if any of the following conditions is found, replace it with new one.

item.ptxt: Side-air bag/curtain air bag being deployed.
Deformation or damage of rear side-impact sensor
Damage of rear side-impact sensor connector
